prerequisites.value: Dex 13, Improved Grapple, Improved Unarmed Strike.

description.value: **Benefit:** When a flat-footed creature is unaware of your presence and you successfully grapple it, you can attempt a second grapple combat maneuver check to pin the creature as a free action. If you have the Chokehold feat, you can instead use this second combat maneuver check to initiate a chokehold.
